entity.label: Blastus
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: chamberlain to king Herod Agrippa I. ( Acts 12:20 ). Such persons generally had great influence with their masters.

nodes.label: Blastus
nodes.description: chamberlain to king Herod Agrippa I. ( Acts 12:20 ). Such persons generally had great influence with their masters.

verses.text: And Herod was highly displeased with them of Tyre and Sidon: but they came with one accord to him, and, having made Blastus the king’s chamberlain their friend, desired peace; because their country was nourished by the king’s country.
